diagrams.title: Green IT Framework Overview
diagrams.description: Shows the interconnected components of Green IT implementation
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the holistic nature of Green IT implementation and how different components work together for sustainability.

diagrams.title: PUE Calculation Diagram
diagrams.description: Visual representation of how PUE is calculated in a data center
elements: Total Facility Energy (cooling, lighting, power distribution, IT equipment)
Formula: PUE = Total Facility Energy / IT Equipment Energy
diagrams.purpose: Clarifying the PUE metric calculation and understanding what constitutes facility vs IT energy for proper measurement.

diagrams.title: Virtualization Benefits
diagrams.description: Comparison showing before and after virtualization server utilization
elements: Before: 10 physical servers at 20% utilization each
After: 3 physical servers at 65% utilization each
Energy savings, Cost savings, Reduced carbon footprint, Less heat generation
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the impact of virtualization on resource utilization and environmental benefits.

diagrams.title: E-waste Lifecycle
diagrams.description: Shows the lifecycle of electronic products from manufacturing to disposal
elements: Raw Material Extraction → Manufacturing → Distribution → Use → Collection → Recycling/Disposal
diagrams.purpose: Understanding where environmental impacts occur and where intervention through 3Rs can reduce negative effects.
